Interface ILasWriter

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions

ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to members of LasWriter.

[Guid("3AB70C14-75FC-4F66-B511-06192AEF160D")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ILasWriter
